name: Million Dollar Pickles
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sliced cucumbers and 1/2 cup of pickling salt. Cover with water and let stand for at least 3 hours.
2. Drain the mixture.
3. Chop the pimento, peppers, and onions.
4. Add the remaining ingredients (cucumbers, cider vinegar, mustard seed, turmeric, and sugar) to the chopped vegetables.
5. Boil everything together for 10 minutes.
6. Pack into hot jars and seal them tightly.
Makes 8 pints.
